did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study primarily evaluated the diagnostic performance of Line-Field Confocal Optical Coherence Tomography (LC-OCT) and dermoscopy for diagnosing non-melanoma skin cancers, with diagnoses made by expert dermatologists. While the paper mentions that an AI-based prototype software was developed to identify BCC lobules in LC-OCT images (Chunk 16), it does not report that this AI system was used to obtain the study's results or diagnostic data; the results are based on expert clinical assessment and histopathology.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
